headlines.text: Iran re-closes Strait of Hormuz, demands US lift naval blockade as Wednesday ceasefire deadline looms
Trump warns Iran: deal will happen 'the nice way or the hard way' as negotiations stall
US Energy Secretary Wright says America 'not too far away from a deal' with Iran
Democrats notch another special election overperformance in New Jersey House race
Former immigration judges speak out against Trump's 'deportation judge' replacements
British counterterror police probe Iranian proxy arson attacks on London synagogues
IRGC gunboats fire on tanker in Strait of Hormuz with no radio warning
Justin Bieber brings out Billie Eilish, SZA, and Sexyy Red at Coachella Weekend 2 — redeems himself
S&P 500 and Dow close at fresh records Friday on Strait of Hormuz reopening optimism
National gas average hits $4.08 — highest since 2022 — as Iran war squeezes supply

breaking.text: Iran has re-closed the Strait of Hormuz and IRGC gunboats fired on a tanker — ceasefire expires Wednesday

stories.hed: Hormuz: Open, Closed, Open, Closed — Iran Treats the World's Most Important Waterway Like a Screen Door
stories.dek: Iran shut the Strait of Hormuz again Saturday, one day after triumphantly reopening it, blaming US 'breaches of trust.' Trump says a deal will happen 'the nice way or the hard way,' which is a perfectly terrifying thing to say with a ceasefire expiring on Wednesday.

stories.hed: London Counterterror Police Probe Arson Attacks on Synagogues as Possible Iranian Proxy Operation
stories.dek: British counterterror officers are investigating a string of overnight arson attacks on Jewish sites in northwest London, including a synagogue in Harrow, as potentially the work of Iranian proxies. No injuries reported, but the timing — mid-Iran war — is doing a lot of talking.

stories.hed: Democrats Post Another Special Election Overperformance, Narrow GOP's Razor-Thin House Majority
stories.dek: Analilia Mejia won New Jersey's 11th District in a special House election, CNN projects, continuing a string of Democratic overperformances that are making Republicans very nervous about the 2026 midterms. Turns out running a war and purging judges is a complicated campaign pitch.

stories.hed: Trump Purges 200+ Immigration Judges, Replaces Them with 'Deportation Judges' — Former Jurists Push Back
stories.dek: More than 200 immigration judges have been fired, forced out, or retired, replaced by what the administration calls 'deportation judges.' Former judges say due process is being gutted; the administration says the old system was too slow. Both are right, which is the awkward part.

stories.hed: Trump Is Golfing in Virginia While Iran Plays Hot-Potato With the Strait of Hormuz and a Wednesday Deadline Ticks Down
stories.dek: As Iran fires on tankers, closes the Strait, reopens it, then closes it again, and a ceasefire literally expires in three days, CNN confirms the president is at his golf course. To be fair, Vance, Witkoff, and Kushner are on it — which is either comforting or terrifying depending on your priors.

markets.context: Stocks surged to record highs Friday after Iran briefly declared the Strait of Hormuz open, crashing oil prices more than 10% on hopes the war's worst supply shock may be easing.

gas.note: Your wallet called. It's not doing well. Neither is the Strait of Hormuz.

popCulture.hed: Justin Bieber Redeems Himself at Coachella Weekend 2 — Brings Out Billie Eilish, SZA, Big Sean, and Sexyy Red
popCulture.dek: After Week 1's divisive YouTube-laptop set got called 'the worst in festival history,' Bieber came back swinging Saturday night with a star-studded set that sent the crowd into actual frenzy. He serenaded Billie Eilish mid-set with 'One Less Lonely Girl,' proving he still has it — and a $10M Coachella check to cash.

genZ.term: Triple T Sance (Tung Tung Tung Sahur dance)
genZ.definition: A viral TikTok dance trend where users dance to 'Dumb wit it (get in dea)' by Geaux Teezy alongside an AI-generated dancing version of 'Tung Tung Tung Sahur,' an absurdist brainrot character that has taken over For You Pages in April 2026. It's the kind of thing that makes perfect sense if you've been extremely online for the past two weeks and zero sense if you have not.
genZ.usage: Iran re-closing the Strait of Hormuz for the second time in 48 hours is giving major Triple T Sance energy — chaotic, inexplicable, and somehow everyone is still watching.

tldr: Iran whiplashed the world Sunday by re-closing the Strait of Hormuz one day after opening it, firing on a tanker, and refusing to send a delegation to Pakistan talks — all with a ceasefire expiring Wednesday. Meanwhile, stocks closed at record highs Friday on the brief optimism, gas sits at a 4-year high, and Justin Bieber actually showed up at Coachella this time.
